taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: React, PrimeReact, AngularJS, REST APIs, AI-assisted development tools
skill_match_scores: React:1.0, PrimeReact:0.0, AngularJS:1.0, REST APIs:1.0, AI-assisted development tools:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, MIS, Business Administration, or equivalent experience, Three (3) years of experience developing modern web applications, Strong experience with React (PrimeReact preferred); AngularJS experience is also acceptable, Experience consuming REST APIs and working with backend teams, Experience using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, or similar) to improve developer productivity, code quality, or documentation, Understanding front-end performance, accessibility, and usability, Ability to work in a complex, regulated enterprise environment, Willingness and ability to learn healthcare workflows and backend system constraints
preferred_quals: Four or more (4) + years of experience developing modern web applications, Experience with PrimeReact, Redux, or similar libraries, Experience working with Java/Spring Boot or other backend platforms, Experience designing or using agentic AI workflows (e.g., AI agents for code generation, refactoring assistance, test creation, or knowledge extraction from legacy systems), Familiarity with integrating AI tools into enterprise development workflows, including prompt engineering, guardrails, and human‑in‑the‑loop validation, Familiarity with healthcare or insurance applications, Experience improving developer experience (testing, tooling, documentation), Experience using AI assisted tools for UI scaffolding, test generation, and documentation
core_responsibilities: Design and develop user interfaces for Claims and Health Plan applications, Ensure frontend implementations follow established architectural patterns and boundaries, Partner with backend teams to deliver cohesive end-to-end functionality, Implement unit and integration tests for UI components, Help standardize frontend patterns and improve developer productivity, Participate in troubleshooting and production support as needed
job_summary: HealthPartners is currently hiring a Software Engineer – Frontend & Developer Experience. This role supports the modernization of Health Plan administrative and claims user interfaces and is responsible for building high performing user experiences using modern frontend technologies while enhancing developer productivity through better tooling and practices.
